name: Phase 9 v2: Landing Page Core
description: Verifies that the landing page renders correctly and empty forms are disabled.

planSteps.description: Assert that the heading 'Detect FUD before it' is visible on the page
Assert that there is an input field with placeholder 'e.g. PEPE' visible on the page
Assert that the 'Run analysis' button is disabled when the input field is empty
Assert that there is a link to the GitHub repository visible somewhere on the page
